have h_main : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h1 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) =ᶠ[𝓝[≠] 0] (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) := by

    have h2 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * 1)) := by

        have h4 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by

            -- Use the fact that sin(x)/x tends to 1 as x tends to 0
            have h6 : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) 0 := by

              have h7 : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x) 0 := Real.continuous_sin.continuousAt
              have h8 : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) 0 := continuousAt_id

                    -- Use the known limit of sin(x)/x as x tends to 0
                    have h13 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 1) :=
                      (Real.tendsto_sin_div_self)
                    exact h13
                  have h14 : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) 0 := by
                    -- Use the fact that the limit exists and is finite to conclude continuity
                    have h15 : ContinuousAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) 0 := by
                      apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_nhds.mp (h12.mono_left nhdsWithin_le_nhds)
                    exact h15
                  exact h14
                exact h10
              exact h9
            -- Use the fact that sin(x)/x tends to 1 as x tends to 0
            have h17 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by

              have h19 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by

                  aesop
                simpa [h26] using h27
              have h30 : r * (0 : ℝ) = 0 := by ring

            by_cases hr : r = 0
            · simp_all
            · exact h22 hr
          have h31 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := by
            have h32 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h4
            have h33 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := h21

              have h35 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) = (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) ∘ (fun x : ℝ => r * x) := by

                have h39 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := h21
                have h40 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h4
                have h41 : Tendsto ((fun x : ℝ => Real.sin x / x) ∘ (fun x : ℝ => r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) :=
                  h40.comp h39
                exact h41
              exact h38
            exact h34
          exact h31
        exact h20
      have h42 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * 1)) := by
        have h43 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x)) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 1) := h3
        have h44 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * 1)) :=

        exact h44
      exact h42
    have h45 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h46 : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) =ᶠ[𝓝[≠] 0] (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) := h1

        <;>

        <;>

have h : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
    have h₁ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) (Real.cos (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r) 0 := by

      have h₂ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) (Real.cos (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r) 0 := by
        have h₃ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => r * x) r 0 := by
          simpa using (hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ)).const_mul r
        have h₄ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) (Real.cos (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r) 0 := by
          -- Use the chain rule to differentiate sin(r * x)
          have h₅ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => r * x) r 0 := h₃
          have h₆ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) (Real.cos (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r) 0 := by
            convert HasDerivAt.sin (h₅) using 1 <;> ring_nf <;> simp [mul_comm]
          exact h₆
        exact h₄
      exact h₂
    -- Use the fact that the limit of sin(r * x) / x as x approaches 0 is r
    have h₂ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h₃ : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) =ᶠ[𝓝[≠] 0] (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) := by rfl
      have h₄ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h₅ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) (Real.cos (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r) 0 := h₁
        -- Use the fact that the derivative of sin(r * x) at 0 is r
        have h₆ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) 0 = r := by
          have h₇ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) 0 = Real.cos (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r := by
            apply HasDerivAt.deriv
            exact h₁
          rw [h₇]
          <;> norm_num <;> ring_nf <;> simp [cos_zero]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num
        -- Use the fact that the limit of sin(r * x) / x as x approaches 0 is r
        have h₇ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (deriv (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) 0)) := by
          have h₈ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (deriv (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) 0)) := by
            convert (hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto_slope (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) 0).mp h₁ using 1
            <;>
            (try
              simp_all [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]) <;>
            (try
              field_simp [sub_ne_zero]) <;>
            (try
              ring_nf) <;>
            (try
              simp_all [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]) <;>
            (try
              norm_num) <;>
            (try
              linarith)
          exact h₈
        -- Conclude that the limit is r
        have h₈ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x)) 0 = r := h₆
        have h₉ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
          convert h₇ using 1
          <;> simp_all [h₈]
        exact h₉
      exact h₄
    exact h₂
  exact h

have h₀ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by

            simp_all [h₆]
            <;> norm_num
            <;> simp_all [tendsto_const_nhds]
            <;> aesop

            have h₇ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * (0 : ℝ))) := by

                -- Use the fact that the limit of r * x as x approaches 0 is 0
                have h₁₂ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * (0 : ℝ))) := by

                  apply Tendsto.mono_left _ nhdsWithin_le_nhds

                exact h₁₂

            -- Check that r * x approaches 0 as x approaches 0
            have h₁₀ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
              -- Use the fact that r * x approaches 0 as x approaches 0
              have h₁₁ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * (0 : ℝ))) := h₇
              have h₁₂ : r * (0 : ℝ) = 0 := by ring
              have h₁₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := by simpa [h₁₂] using h₁₁
              -- Check that r * x ≠ 0 if x ≠ 0 and r ≠ 0
              have h₁₄ : ∀ᶠ (x : ℝ) in 𝓝[≠] 0, r * x ≠ 0 := by
                filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with x hx
                -- Check that r * x ≠ 0 if x ≠ 0 and r ≠ 0
                have h₁₅ : x ≠ 0 := hx
                have h₁₆ : r ≠ 0 := h₆
                have h₁₇ : r * x ≠ 0 := by
                  intro h₁₈
                  apply h₁₅
                  apply mul_left_cancel₀ h₁₆
                  linarith
                exact h₁₇
              -- Use the fact that r * x approaches 0 and r * x ≠ 0
              have h₁₅ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
                -- Use the fact that r * x approaches 0 and r * x ≠ 0
                have h₁₆ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 0) := h₁₃
                have h₁₇ : ∀ᶠ (x : ℝ) in 𝓝[≠] 0, r * x ≠ 0 := h₁₄
                -- Use the fact that r * x approaches 0 and r * x ≠ 0
                have h₁₈ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by

                  have h₁₉ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝[≠] 0) := by

                    simp_all

        -- Use the fact that sin(r * x) / x = r * (sin(r * x) / (r * x)) if r ≠ 0
        by_cases h₆ : r = 0
        · -- If r = 0, then sin(r * x) / x = 0 / x = 0
          simp_all [h₆]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> simp_all [tendsto_const_nhds]
          <;> aesop
        · -- If r ≠ 0, then sin(r * x) / x = r * (sin(r * x) / (r * x))
          have h₇ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by

                <;> ring
                <;> aesop

            -- Use the fact that r * (sin(r * x) / (r * x)) approaches r as x approaches 0
            have h₁₀ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => r * (Real.sin (r * x) / (r * x))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 (r * 1)) := by
